description_long: This is a small, stylized bunny doll with a rounded body and large, upright ears. Its surface is predominantly pink with darker pink and purple accents, including spots on the body, ear tips, and facial markings. The face features large, circular eyes with intricate patterns, a small nose, and a smiling mouth with visible teeth. The doll's arms and legs are short and rounded, giving it a playful, cartoonish appearance. The back of the head displays a single red dot and a band of pink stripes, while the front is more detailed with expressive facial features. The overall finish is glossy, suggesting a plastic or vinyl material, and the object appears lightweight and hollow.
description: A glossy pink bunny doll with large upright ears, patterned eyes, and playful facial markings. It features purple and red accents and a rounded, cartoonish body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's expressive face, patterned eyes, smiling mouth, and detailed pink and purple facial markings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ears and the rounded profile of the head and limbs, with less facial detail visible.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a single red dot on the head, pink stripes, and the simple, rounded back of the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the ear thickness and the side profile of the limbs and head.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll does not wear separate clothing; its body is decorated with painted-on patterns including pink and purple spots, facial markings, and a simulated collar.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms slightly extended outward and legs apart. The head is facing forward, and the ears are pointed straight up.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a smiling expression with upturned mouth corners, wide open eyes with patterned irises, and arched pink eyebrows, giving it a cheerful and playful look.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and painted with facial features and markings.
